prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 51.8 kg; Height 165.1 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 6.4%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 123mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.3kg; 9 months ago 54.8kg; 6 months ago 55.2kg; 3 months ago 51.2kg; current 51.8kg), Height (12 months ago 165.1cm; 9 months ago 165.1cm; 6 months ago 165.1cm; 3 months ago 165.1cm; current 165.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 59U/L; 9 months ago 68U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 63U/L), AST (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 51U/L; 6 months ago 52U/L; 3 months ago 56U/L; current 54U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; current 56mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 312mg/g; 9 months ago 282mg/g; 6 months ago 259mg/g; 3 months ago 186mg/g; current 200mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 94mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 61mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 115mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 114mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.46 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
